dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3730 IS: Emergency Medical Services Reimbursement for On-Scene Care and Support Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Welch (for himself, Mr. Sanders, Ms. Smith, Ms. Klobuchar, Mr. Fetterman, and Mr. Bennet) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend title XVIII of the Social Security Act to provide Medicare coverage of ambulance services that do not include transportation.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Emergency Medical Services Reimbursement for On-Scene Care and Support Act.

section.header: Coverage of ambulance services that do not include transportation
section.text: Section 1861(s)(7) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1395x(s)(7)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A), as added by paragraph (1), by inserting and after the semicolon; and
by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: notwithstanding subparagraph (A), ambulance service includes such services described in such subparagraph that are furnished on or after January 1, 2027, to an individual by a provider or supplier of ambulance services regardless of whether the provider or supplier provides the transport for the individual at a reimbursement comparable to the transport reimbursement;
